title: The Harvest Men
hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.
location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds

villain.worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice.
villain.motive: Convert the player from observer to willing participant.

arcs.title: Contact and Contradiction
arcs.summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

arcs.title: Interference and Doubt
arcs.summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.

arcs.title: Confrontation and Reckoning
arcs.summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.

beats.title: Dusk Selection
beats.narrative: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses.

incomingMessages.text: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Blood-soil composition panel.
The valley watched you before you arrived. (Peripheral Presence)

responseOptions.label: Analyze soil reports linked to ritual sites
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Analyze soil reports linked to ritual sites

responseOptions.label: Interrogate the runaway before the elders find them
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Interrogate the runaway before the elders find them

beats.title: Escalation Signal
beats.narrative: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk.

incomingMessages.text: A contradictory channel drop appears within minutes and forces risk. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.

beats.title: Trust Fracture
beats.narrative: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.

incomingMessages.text: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Runaway voice memo.
You keep calling this rescue. They call it theft. (Psychological Contact)

responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Trust Visiting Agronomist Dina Crowe and secure witness

responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Trust Village Elder Rowan Pike and expose internal leak

beats.title: Ultimatum Window
beats.narrative: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts.

incomingMessages.text: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Mask stitch microscopy.
Miss the dusk bell and the boy is chosen next. (Active Interference)

responseOptions.label: Divert to save threatened NPC
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Divert to save threatened NPC

responseOptions.label: Continue forensic pursuit under threat
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Continue forensic pursuit under threat

beats.title: Confrontation Protocol
beats.narrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.

incomingMessages.text: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Blood-soil composition panel.
Confess one lie and I return one life. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.label: Commit to formal accusation and expose evidence chain
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Commit to formal accusation and expose evidence chain

responseOptions.label: Take private contact route for hidden confession
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Take private contact route for hidden confession

beats.title: Case Debrief
beats.narrative: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.

incomingMessages.text: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Festival lantern route map.

responseOptions.label: Proceed with controlled pressure
responseOptions.summary: Advance investigation while preserving evidence discipline.

endings.title: Clean Resolution
endings.summary: You dismantle the selection machine and evacuate vulnerable targets alive.
endings.epilogue: Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.
endings.sequelHook: A tagged evidence box points to the next case.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: You halt tonight's rite but trigger retaliatory disappearances.
endings.epilogue: The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.
endings.sequelHook: A surviving witness asks for help in a linked disappearance.

endings.title: Corruption Pact
endings.summary: You preserve the rite in exchange for selective immunity.
endings.epilogue: You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.
endings.sequelHook: Season continuity marks the player as compromised.

nodes.label: The Reaper Steward
nodes.summary: Primary antagonist operating through layered identities.

nodes.label: Runaway Teen Lio Strand
nodes.summary: Possible accomplice with motive and access.

nodes.label: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds

timeline.summary: Witness account conflicts with archive records.
Villain contact shifts to direct intimidation.

playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. Your pattern-recognition profile flagged a match with prior unresolved incidents.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: The Reaper Steward has fixated on The player detective profile. If the case stalls, collateral witnesses remain exposed.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Contact and Contradiction: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies. Maintain evidence discipline and document every ritual violence marker.

weeks.label: Week 1 - Recruitment And Baseline
weeks.objective: Players receive synchronized SMS photos of the same ritual mask in three different houses.
keyMoments: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

weeks.label: Week 2 - Contradiction Mapping
weeks.objective: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.
keyMoments: Scientific analysis vs witness protection opening

weeks.label: Week 3 - Escalation Window
weeks.objective: Run live interventions while antagonist pressure rises and trust fractures.
keyMoments: Break rite now vs infiltrate final rite

weeks.label: Week 4 - Endgame And Debrief
weeks.objective: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.
keyMoments: Ancestral entity fed through staged rituals
A freight invoice ties the valley rite to coastal distributors.

npcDossiers.notableSecret: Visiting Agronomist Dina Crowe can expose the-harvest-men-clue-pressure at high trust.
Village Elder Rowan Pike can expose the-harvest-men-clue-reveal at high trust.
Runaway Teen Lio Strand can expose the-harvest-men-clue-origin at high trust.
Festival Marshal Jarek Holt can expose the-harvest-men-clue-pressure at high trust.

communityPuzzles.title: Lantern Route Triangulation
communityPuzzles.objective: Merge three lantern route fragments to locate the hidden threshing pit.

shards.content: Host receives a hand-drawn route with one erased landmark.
Ally A gets old festival timestamps with off-by-one pattern.
Broadcast weather radar exposes smoke columns only at key coordinates.

communityPuzzles.failureConsequence: The villain captures your partial decode and reroutes the final branch.
